## Design language: EVIDENTIA (DL-14)

**Proof over persuasion.** Ancient Rome: Proof.

Status: candidate. Occasions: evidence-led strategy decks, diagnostic readouts, cost and value driver analyses.

### Design laws

- Every exhibit answers one question
- Sources are mandatory
- Footnotes are integral
- Quantitative proof dominates
- Conclusions follow evidence

### Constitution (deterministic communication contract)

| Dimension | Value |
|---|---|
| narrative_style | evidence-first |
| density | operational |
| annotation_policy | guided |
| legend_policy | direct-labels-only |
| highlight_policy | single |
| decision_style | recommendation-with-owner |
| reading_time | minute |
| charts_per_page | 1 |

### Palette

| Role | Hex |
|---|---|
| background | `#FFFFFF` |
| ink | `#0B1F35` |
| body | `#3C4A5A` |
| hairline | `#C7D0D9` |
| gridline | `#E3E8ED` |
| primary | `#2251FF` |
| muted | `#A9B4C0` |
| benchmark | `#6E7E8E` |
| positive | `#2E6E4E` |
| negative | `#9E2B25` |

### Fonts

- display: Georgia,serif, weight 700
- body: 'Segoe UI',Arial,sans-serif, weight 400

### Chrome

kicker: false, eyebrow: true
